description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden cabinet with a rectangular top and vertical slatted panels on its front and sides. The cabinet features two front doors, each with a small round knob, suggesting access to internal storage space. The wood has a dark, weathered finish with visible blackened patches, giving it a rustic, aged appearance. The sides are plain with the same vertical slat design, while the back is a solid, unadorned wooden panel. The cabinet stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall design is utilitarian yet classic, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or as outdoor storage in urban environments.
description: A tall, narrow, rustic wooden cabinet with two front doors and a weathered, dark finish. It stands on short legs and features vertical slat detailing.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing vertical slats and a weathered wood texture with no visible handles or doors.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying two doors with small round knobs and vertical slat detailing, highlighting the main access point.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, with vertical slats and a dark, aged wood finish, no handles or doors visible.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet, a solid wooden panel with a consistent weathered finish and no visible openings or features.
